sections.description: Enterprise-grade cookie consent management compliant with GDPR/EEA, UK DUAA, US CCPA and multi-state privacy laws, LGPD, PIPEDA, Quebec Law 25, Switzerland nFADP, Australia Privacy Act, India DPDP, and other global privacy regulations. Features IAB TCF v2.3, Google Consent Mode v2, Global Privacy Control (GPC) signal support, automatic script blocking, local consent logging, 40+ languages, WCAG accessibility, and a built-in privacy policy generator. Completely free with no upsells, no telemetry, and no external API calls.
sections.installation: Upload the plugin to /wp-content/plugins/ and activate.
